title: rhododendron quadrasianum subsp. angustissimum
intro: Rhododendron quadrasianum subsp. angustissimum, also known as the Himalayan rhododendron or narrow-leaved rhododendron, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the rhododendron family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Ayurveda, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron quadrasianum subsp. angustissimum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
